title: Delivery config item (GET /delivery)
description: One user's off-console delivery configuration (the Mindy Line). Source of truth: the console-api delivery config store (NEW — CONSOLE-CONTRACTS.md sections 3.3 /delivery and 4.2: Matrix by default per /task/713, managed via delivery.* ops; agent-malleable like subscriptions). Delivery RECEIPTS are not a separate endpoint: they are query-plane reads over persisted `delivery.receipt` emissions (scope user:<owner>). cocoon_until implements the delivery.cocoon op (suppress non-interrupt delivery until then). Filters: `owner` (implicitly the caller's own line unless privileged). Consumers MUST ignore unknown fields.

owner.description: The user this delivery line belongs to (authentik username). Scope: user:<owner>.

channel.description: Delivery channel. Matrix is the default and only channel today (/task/713); the enum grows additively.

target.description: Channel-specific target (e.g. the Matrix user id / room the digests+interrupts go to).

verified.description: true = a delivery.test round-trip has confirmed this target receives.

cocoon_until.description: RFC 3339 UTC — non-interrupt delivery is suppressed until this instant (delivery.cocoon); null = not cocooned.

next_digest_at.description: RFC 3339 UTC — when the next digest batch is scheduled to send; null = nothing pending / digests disabled.

updated_by.description: Who last changed the config (principal id — the UI menu and an agent edit the same store).
